game.title: El boleto número 13
game.story_connection: The winning lottery ticket #13 is blowing away in the wind - catch it before it's gone!

mechanics.core_loop: Chase and tap the ticket as it blows around the screen erratically

controls.tap: Tap on the ticket to catch it (must be precise)

ticket_behavior.movement: Floats and darts around screen unpredictably
ticket_behavior.wind_gusts: Sudden gusts push ticket in random direction
ticket_behavior.near_miss: If tap is close but misses, ticket zooms away

visuals.background: Outdoor scene with wind effects (leaves, dust)
visuals.ticket: Golden ticket with #13, flutters and spins
visuals.coco_mango: At bottom looking up, react when ticket caught/missed

instructions_text: ¡Atrapa el boleto número 13! Toca el boleto antes de que se vuele. ¡Cuidado con el viento!
